item.title: Extract shared backlog iteration helper — for-loop-over-BACKLOG_FILES pattern repeated 10+ times
item.intent: Replace the 10+ copies of the for f in BACKLOG_FILES / jq operation pattern with reusable helpers like map_backlog_files() and sum_backlog_field()
steps: Identify all instances of the for f in BACKLOG_FILES iteration pattern
Categorize by usage: summing counts, finding items, transforming items
Extract sum_backlog_field() for count aggregation across files
Extract find_in_backlogs() for item lookup across files
Replace all call sites with the appropriate helper
acceptanceCriteria: The raw for f in BACKLOG_FILES pattern appears in at most 2 places (the helpers themselves)
